positive: A majestic, stylized mountain landscape silhouette at sunset. The scene features jagged peaks, flowing stylized rivers, and geometric floral elements integrated into the foothills. Composition should be centered, creating a strong, easily recognizable negative space ideal for t-shirts. Use a two-tone color palette with rich indigo and burnt orange gradients for maximum contrast. The artwork should have bold, clean lines, a minimalist aesthetic, and a high level of detail in the negative space area. Style: Neo-Western Folk Art mixed with Abstract Minimalist line work. Composition: Vertical and centered, suitable for chest placement. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting to enhance the silhouette effect. Print-friendly: Vector-like clean edges, scalable design, high contrast.
negative: blurry, amateur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, low detail, dirty, grayscale, duplicate, extra limbs, bad anatomy
